mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_sync_task ( user_id, source_id, task_type, task_status, file_name, metric_category, total_count, insert_count, update_count, fail_count, summary_message, started_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{sourceId}, #{taskType}, #{taskStatus}, #{fileName}, #{metricCategory}, #{totalCount}, #{insertCount}, #{updateCount}, #{failCount}, #{summaryMessage}, #{startedTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT task.task_id, task.user_id, task.source_id, source.source_name, task.task_type, task.task_status, task.file_name, task.metric_category, task.total_count, task.insert_count, task.update_count, task.fail_count, task.summary_message, task.started_time, task.finished_time, task.created_time, task.last_change_time FROM t_sync_task task LEFT JOIN t_data_source source ON source.source_id = task.source_id WHERE task.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY task.started_time DESC, task.task_id DESC LIMIT 1
